meta.in_world_date: 2026 — Year 4 after the Astral Gate accident
meta.masthead_note: Earth-produced, Mars-relayed via the first colony satellite

stocks.name: Pippu Cola
stocks.note: Competition pressures continue to impact sales

stocks.note: Reaffirmed stability brings in investors; shares rebound

bounty_board.name: Rufus "The Lighthouse" Obara
bounty_board.crime: Hit four GATE tollbooths on the Tharsis line in one night

bounty_board.name: Sister Annalise Voss
bounty_board.crime: Ran a relief convoy that relieved itself of the relief; fraud on six moons

bounty_board.name: The Quiet Brothers
bounty_board.crime: Hijacked a water freighter out of Europa

bounty_board.name: Saboteur X
bounty_board.crime: Suspected in destabilizing Ganymede Gate systems; potential syndicate ties

Mars.note: acting like the capital; seizing strategic opportunities

Ganymede.note: further isolated by Mars' aggressive actions

Venus.note: prosperous, quiet rival; spore problem brewing

Belt.note: salvage and mining frontier; syndicate recruiting ground

Earth.note: showers near their worst; 1.5B survivors; sector government

GanymedeGate.note: suspected sabotage; extended inspections causing delays

Mars.note: land rush, strategic partnerships forming; hiring boom

Titan.note: NO WAR YET — that is the 2060s; keep desolate, unclaimed

characters.name: Independent Ring of Satellite Intelligence
characters.visual: battered orbital satellite interior; green phosphor readouts; one lens turned toward a wounded Earth

characters.name: Antonio, Carlos & Jobim
characters.state: lost the Alba City domino league; insist they built the table
characters.visual: three weathered old men at a card table, mismatched, never quite looking at each other

characters.name: Mara Okonkwo
characters.visual: young woman, 19, oil-smudged coveralls, glow of an old terminal on her face

characters.name: Tomas Reyes
characters.state: mapped a drained Ganymede shelf on foot
characters.visual: lean figure in a worn exo-suit on a grey tidal flat, hand-drawn map under one arm

characters.name: Lila Nguyen
characters.visual: resourceful engineer amidst asteroid debris, sensor scanner in hand

characters.name: Navid Anwar
characters.visual: enthusiastic engineer tinkering with soil samples in a small depot on Io

characters.name: Asha Patel
characters.visual: determined miner in safety gear, standing amid asteroid rocks with a torch

threads.title: The Tharsis Accord & the Ganymede holdout
threads.summary: Mars intensifies tactics, seizing a Ganymede cargo ship in disputed space.

threads.title: Will the new Woolong hold?
threads.summary: First Solar Bank reaffirms stability post-investigation, shares rebound.
next_beats: a syndicate makes a big play

threads.title: The cowboy program finds its feet
threads.summary: New bounty on Ganymede Gate saboteur; cowboy interest rises.

threads.title: The Ganymede gate is not as stable as they say
threads.summary: Suspected sabotage delays Ganymede Gate reopening.

threads.title: Mars learns to build for itself

threads.title: The showers are getting worse
threads.summary: Meteor showers hit Pacific Rim with force; IRSI regains trust.

issue_3: Ganymede makes a strategic countermove by offering freight subsidies to bypass Mars gate tolls.
Meteor showers continue to intensify over East Asia, causing further disruptions in communication.
First Solar Bank stabilizes following the currency wobble; confidence in Woolong restored.
A temporary closure of Ganymede Gate considered due to ongoing stability concerns.
The Quiet Brothers spotted near Titan; new cowboy interest sparks pursuit.
Forecast missed another impact in the Siberian Plate; calls for algorithm adjustments.
Oona Lee, a Venusian artist, gains attention for her floating biome sculptures inspired by Venusian spore clouds.
Gina Motors announces the expansion of its production line to accommodate growing demand from Mars and beyond.
issue_4: Mars increases trade pressure on Ganymede by imposing tariffs on oceanic products.
Meteor showers over Indian Ocean cause unexpected sea level shifts, prompting emergency protocols.
RedDragon syndicate attempts to manipulate First Solar Bank's stock through insider trading; ISSP investigates.
Ganymede Gate's temporary closure extended as further inspections are conducted.
The Quiet Brothers narrowly escape capture on Titan; tension mounts among bounty hunters.
IRSI forecasts a severe impact near the Siberian Plate but issues remain with accuracy.
Navid Anwar, an Io-based terraforming technician, gains recognition for pioneering a new soil recycling method.
Venusian company, SporeTech, announces a breakthrough in controlling Venusian spore clouds.
issue_5: Mars intensifies space tensions, seizing a Ganymede cargo ship in a disputed zone.
Meteor showers continue to wreak havoc, this time hitting the Pacific Rim with force.
First Solar Bank reaffirms stability post-investigation, shares rebound.
Ganymede Gate remains under inspection, potential syndicate sabotage suspected.
New bounty posted for alleged saboteur connected to Ganymede Gate disruptions.
IRSI successfully predicts a potential impact over East Asia, regaining trust.
Asha Patel, a Belt miner, awarded for innovative safety measures after rescuing a crew during an asteroid collapse.
Helios Solar Freight partners with Mars Coalition to streamline off-world logistics amid gate concerns.
